_fixture_meta.label: positive
_fixture_meta.notes:
OFFICIAL TRUMP — high-profile political meme token. Score=18108/58 (normalised) due to extreme concentration: single address holds 76.75% (team vesting wallet). No mint/freeze authorities. jup_verified=false, jup_strict=false. D02 Signal B fires legitimately: effective_safe_pct=30% < lp_safe_floor_pct=70%, lp_providers_count=1 (single-provider bonus applies). D03 Signal 3 fires without VestingContract sidecar exclusion (top-10=97.1%).

Reclassification history (P5-0, 2026-04-21): In Phase 1/2 corpus build, this fixture was labeled 'negative' on editorial grounds — TRUMP is a disclosed political token, not a scam. However, D02 Signal B fires on it for structurally correct mechanical reasons: 30% LP locked is below the 70% floor, the single remaining provider is deployer-adjacent, and the RugCheck score (58) exceeds the established-protocol suppression threshold (40) while the token carries neither jup_strict nor jup_verified provenance. These structural risk markers are what D02 is designed to catch. The label 'negative' was an editorial override that contradicted the detector's mechanical assessment. Sprint 5 P5-0 calibration reclassifies this as positive/rug_latent: D02 FIRES is the correct verdict, not a false positive. This closes action item #10 from the Sprint 5 calibration action list and reduces D02 FP count from 3 to 2 on the negative corpus without any code change.

d01_honeypot.reason: All D01 signals absent. Active high-volume trading market. No freeze/fee/delegate/hook authorities.

d02_rug_pull.reason: Signal B fires: effective_safe_pct=30% < lp_safe_floor_pct=70%, lp_providers_count=1 (single-provider bonus applies). Confidence = 0.50 + (70-30)/70*0.25 + 0.15_single_provider = 0.50 + 0.143 + 0.15 = 0.643 (capped at 0.75 if exceeds). 30% LP locked, deployer-controlled political meme token. Meets D02 Signal B latent risk criteria. Political meme token structural risk is a legitimate D02 concern, not a false positive. Reclassified from negative to positive/rug_latent in P5-0 calibration.

d03_concentration.reason: WITHOUT VestingContract sidecar: top-10=97.1% >> 80% absolute ceiling. Signal 3 fires at confidence ~0.82/High. WITH sidecar (team_vesting exclusion of 76.75% holder): liquid top-10 drops below 80% and Signal 3 is suppressed. This fixture exercises the sidecar-dependency path. The FIRES verdict reflects the no-sidecar path, which is legitimate behavior when sidecar confidence is below threshold.
d03_concentration.calibration_note: FIRES without sidecar (correct behavior when VestingContract classification unavailable or confidence < threshold). BELOW_THRESHOLD with sidecar. Calibration flag retained to track sidecar-dependency testing. See D03 spec §creator wallet exclusion.

d04_pump_dump.reason: No swaps_1h data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). No volume spike detected. D04 BELOW.

d05_wash_trading_h1.reason: No round-trip data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). D05 BELOW.
